Provide a clear and concise description of the bug.

---

## Screenshots

If applicable, attach screenshots or screen recordings that illustrate the issue.

---

## Input Files

If relevant, describe:

- image format
- audio format
- dataset
- model checkpoint
- configuration file

Do **not** upload confidential or licensed datasets unless you are permitted to share them.

---

## Additional Information

Please provide any additional information that may help reproduce or diagnose the issue.

Examples include:

- recent code changes,
- custom configuration,
- hardware limitations,
- deployment environment.

---

## Checklist

Before submitting this issue, please confirm:

- [ ] I searched existing GitHub Issues.
- [ ] I am using the latest repository version.
- [ ] I have included reproduction steps.
- [ ] I have included relevant logs or screenshots.
- [ ] I have removed sensitive information from logs and attachments.

---

## Reproducibility

How often does this issue occur?

- [ ] Always
- [ ] Frequently
- [ ] Occasionally
- [ ] Unable to reproduce consistently

---

## Priority

What is the impact of this issue?

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

---

Thank you for helping improve ACCESS-XR. Detailed reports enable faster diagnosis and resolution.
